title: Count function to get number of subtask rows
excerpt: Is it possible to use count() – or some other function – to get the number of rows of subtasks? For example, in the screenshot below, the CutCount field is set to the count({cuts}) . And Cuts is a set of subtasks, in thi…

posts.author: dstonehill (David Stonehill)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to use count() – or some other function – to get the number of rows of subtasks? For example, in the screenshot below, the CutCount field is set to the count({cuts}) . And Cuts is a set of subtasks, in this case 3 rows of subtasks. Thanks!
